coveo:metadata.providerDescription: Allows you to determine a member's eligibility and copayment for particular services.
coveo:metadata.notes: Clicking Eligibility on the Home Page displays an Eligibility Inquiry Disclaimer page. After reviewing the disclaimer information, clicking the I understand button displays the Eligibility Inquiry Search page. This page allows you to perform a member eligibility inquiry.

coveo:metadata.providerDescription: Allows you to calculate real time claim payment estimations based on the information available when the request is processed. Estimates are provided for professional and dental claim types.
coveo:metadata.notes: Clicking Claim Estimator from the Home Page displays the Search page. This page allows you to perform a search for the desired member per the member's number or name.

coveo:metadata.providerDescription: Allows you to check the status of the claims that have been submitted to HealthPartners.
coveo:metadata.notes: Clicking Claims Status Inquiry from the Home Page displays the following Claim Status Inquiry application, which allows you to perform a claim status inquiry. The Search page allows you to perform specific searches per member number (default search tab setting), patient control number, or claim number.

coveo:metadata.providerDescription: Allows you to review, check or audit claim data corresponding to a remittance check, which covers a batch of submitted claims.
coveo:metadata.notes: Clicking Remittance Inquiry on the Home Page displays the Remittance Inquiry application, which allows you to review, check or audit the claim data that corresponds to a remittance check that covers a batch of submitted claims. The Search tab allows you to perform specific searches per check or EFT number (default search tab setting), or per claim number. It also displays a list of remits when performing a search per provider information.
